name: @gjsify/integration-mcp-typescript-sdk
description: Integration tests: MCP TypeScript SDK on GJS and Node. Ports a curated subset of refs/mcp-typescript-sdk/test/ to validate @gjsify/* implementations.

scripts.build:test:gjs: gjsify build src/test.mts --app gjs --globals auto --outfile dist/test.gjs.mjs
scripts.test: yarn build:test && yarn test:node && yarn test:gjs

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
